div1.entryFree: Assistant, subst., helper, associate: her a. or go-between, Wiv. II, 2, 273. to ask those on the banks if they were his --s, R3 IV, 4, 526. allied to eminent --s, H8 I, 1, 62. I'll thy a. be, Rom. II, 3, 90. let me be no a. for a state, but keep a farm and carters, Hml. II, 2, 166 (i. e. no public functionary).
